stemHtml: The functions of an LP booster pump in a gas turbine fuel system are to…

options.a: pressurise the fuel dump system and increase the pressure during refuelling.
options.b: avoid vapour locking and increase the pressure during refuelling.
options.c: increase the pressure during refuelling and prevent cavitation of the HP fuel pump.
options.d: avoid vapour locking and prevent cavitation of the HP fuel pump.
